data.title: Root Insurance and Kikoff team up to offer integrated car insurance; Root's quoting and purchase experience now on Kikoff platform.
data.description: Root Insurance and Kikoff have recently collaborated to introduce a new partnership in Columbus, Ohio. The collaboration allows users of the Kikoff platform to access Root Insurance's services for insurance quoting and purchasing. This partnership aims to enhance the user experience by directly integrating Root's insurance solutions within the Kikoff platform.

CHEVRON: ALL CREW ARE SAFE, AND THE VESSEL REMAINS STABLE, IT IS PROCEEDING TO A SAFE PORT

data.title: 34 AMSURG centers recognized by Newsweek as America's Best ASCs in 2026. Rankings by Statista.
data.description: In Nashville, Tennessee on January 13, 2026, it was announced that 34 AMSURG centers have achieved recognition by being included in Newsweek's 2026 list of America's Best Ambulatory Surgery Centers. This prestigious ranking, produced in collaboration with Statista, highlights the top ambulatory surgical centers (ASCs) across the country. The centers were selected based on their excellence in providing surgical services outside of traditional hospital settings.

data.title: SDJ Gridstone, founded by Jennifer Jura, launches advisory firm to support energy industry decision-makers nationwide.
data.description: SDJ Gridstone, a strategic advisory firm established by Jennifer Jura, a seasoned professional in the energy sector, has declared its official launch across the nation. The firm aims to provide assistance to utilities, investors, trade associations, and related energy organizations. With its entry into the market, SDJ Gridstone is poised to offer its expertise and support to a wide range of clients in the industry.

data.title: Wasabi secures $70M in equity funding, led by L2 Point Management and valued at $1.8B, bringing total funding to $600M.
data.description: A tech company based in Boston, Mass., Wasabi Technologies, known for its Hot Cloud Storage services, revealed securing a significant $70 million in equity funding. Led by L2 Point Management and joined by Pure Storage, along with existing investors like Fidelity Management & Research Company, this funding round has valued Wasabi at $1.8 billion. With this latest financial boost, the company's total funding has exceeded $600 million. The funds will be utilized to drive Wasabi's growth in AI infrastructure, expand its presence globally, and proceed with its ambitious expansion plans.

data.title: F5 partners with Google Cloud to launch F5 NGINXaaS, a cloud-native app delivery solution, consolidating services. #TechNews
data.description: On a recent announcement, F5 (stock symbol: FFIV) unveiled F5 NGINXaaS for Google Cloud, a new managed cloud-native application delivery service. In partnership with Google Cloud, this integration aims to tackle the difficulties associated with handling modern and containerized applications. By combining load balancing, security, and observability into a single solution, enterprises can streamline operations, cut costs, and minimize tool proliferation. This launch signifies a vital step towards simplifying application delivery processes for organizations.

data.title: Leverage Shares by Themes introduce 6 new single stock leveraged ETFs, launched on Jan 13, 2026. Investors can amplify returns of USAR, ONDS, PLUG, ALB, HUT, and UUUU.
data.description: In Greenwich, Connecticut, on January 13, 2026, Leverage Shares by Themes unveiled six new single stock leveraged ETFs for trading. These products aim to boost returns in both positive and negative markets, providing investors with the opportunity to closely participate in the movements of USA Rare Earth, Ondas Holdings, Plug Power, Albemarle, Hut 8, and Energy Fuels. The ETFs were made available for trading on the same day of the announcement. Investors can leverage these products to potentially enhance their investment outcomes related to these specific companies.

data.title: Korn Ferry introduces Talent Suite with 50 years of performance data, aiming to enhance talent decisions with innovative platform.
data.description: In Los Angeles, Korn Ferry (NYSE: KFY) has unveiled the Korn Ferry Talent Suite, a groundbreaking technology platform that integrates over 50 years of the firm's exclusive performance intelligence and data. This innovative solution merges multiple talent applications on a unified SaaS technology platform. The Talent Suite stands out as a significant advantage, enhancing the company by seamlessly integrating its top-tier talent resources and capabilities. This marks a milestone for Korn Ferry, leveraging a wealth of experience and expertise to deliver exceptional talent solutions.

data.title: Franklin Templeton to tokenize institutional money market funds for tokenized finance in San Mateo, Calif.
data.description: In San Mateo, California, Franklin Templeton is gearing up its institutional money market funds for tokenized finance.

data.title: Vaimo names Farah Aslam CEO, North America, as part of plan to strengthen leadership and expand presence in the region.
data.description: Vaimo, a worldwide digital experience agency, revealed today the selection of Farah Aslam as CEO for North America on January 13, 2026. This move demonstrates Vaimo's commitment to bolstering its management team and growing its influence in the area.

data.title: BlazeSports America helps Paralympian Al Mead become USOPA Georgia Chapter President, first in U.S. history.
data.description: On January 13, 2026, it was reported that Mead has achieved a significant milestone by becoming the inaugural Paralympian in the United States to head a USOPA chapter. This historic achievement took place in Atlanta with BlazeSports America, a key part of the U.S. Olympic and Paralympic Multi-Sport Organization Council renowned for its work in adaptive sports and recreation. This signals a new chapter in USOPA as a respected figure from the Paralympic world leads the way, underscoring the organization's commitment to inclusivity and diversity in sports leadership.

data.title: CME Group launching 100-ounce Silver futures contract on Feb 9, 2026 due to high retail demand.
data.description: Today, CME Group, the top derivatives marketplace globally, revealed plans to introduce a new futures contract for 100 ounces of silver on February 9, 2026, pending regulatory approval. The decision comes as silver gains popularity among retail traders seeking to diversify their investments.

data.title: Onebrief raises $200M in Series D at $2.15B valuation, acquires Battle Road Digital to enhance wargaming.
data.description: Onebrief, based in Honolulu, has successfully concluded a Series D funding round, raising an impressive $200 million. This funding has led to a post-money valuation exceeding $2 billion. Additionally, Onebrief has made a strategic move by acquiring Battle Road Digital, a step aimed at broadening their next-generation wargaming capabilities.

data.title: Qstream launches Qstream SMS for job-critical learning, boosting engagement with fast, timely SMS delivery.
data.description: Today, in Burlington, Massachusetts, Qstream announced the introduction of Qstream SMS, a new channel for distributing microlearning content. Qstream is a widely used microlearning platform by large corporations to provide essential learning materials efficiently. This new offering aims to enhance the accessibility and delivery of job-relevant learning materials to a broad audience.

data.title: Hexagon US Federal appoints Elliott Ferguson as President, emphasizing commitment to operational excellence and strategic growth.
data.description: In Chantilly, Virginia, Hexagon US Federal recently revealed changes in leadership and organizational roles to strengthen operational efficiency and drive strategic growth in serving government clients. Effective January 2nd, Elliott Ferguson assumed the role of President at Hexagon US Federal. Ferguson, who has been a part of the company for almost seven years, previously served as the Vice President of the Geospatial Solutions Business Unit. This transition underscores the company's dedication to mission success, with a focus on enhancing services for government customers.

data.title: Teradata completes over 150 AI engagements in 2025, accelerating AI innovation for global enterprises.
data.description: Today in San Diego, on January 13, 2026, Teradata (NYSE: TDC) revealed a notable progress in providing AI-driven solutions for worldwide corporations. In the year 2025 alone, Teradata successfully carried out over 150 AI-centric customer projects, aiding firms in implementing AI efficiently on a large scale...

data.title: USAA data shows differences in Gen X vs. Millennial parents' financial behaviors for Gen Alpha. Over 579,000 Youth accounts analyzed.
data.description: A recent analysis from USAA Federal Savings Bank has shed light on the financial habits of Gen Alpha, the generation born in 2010 or later, as they begin to shape their spending and saving behaviors. Contrasted with the closely scrutinized Gen Z, consisting of individuals born between 1997 and 2009, the study delved into data from more than 579,000 USAA Bank Youth Checking and Savings accounts. The findings unveiled the impact of parental influence on Gen Alpha's financial decisions, as they emerge as the economy's upcoming cohort.
